specific_mechanism: Multiple orthogonal stress dimensions combined make environment uninhabitable for any spurious signal.
llm_application: MANUKA-LLM: per-layer 4-axis normalization (magnitude, sign-skew, kurtosis, phase-consistency) applied simultaneously; spurious activations cannot survive all 4 stress axes.
novelty_claim: Outlier-Safe Pre-Training (2506.19697) and Activation Regularization (2404.03605) cover 1-2 of the axes. Whether the 4-axis combination is published is open.
